name: Stray Kids: Finding SKZ
overview: Stray Kids, who since their debut have dedicated their time to singing and practicing, are rookies in entertaiment shows! In their first reality show, they will train to become main stream entertainers thanks to amazing opportunities that will pay homage to popular entertainment shows!

trailers.title: [찾았다 스트레이 키즈 소장판] Visual Teaser | Finding SKZ Get edition
